name: signfy-recording-server
description: Signfy Recording System - AWS Lambda Backend

scripts.package:shared: mkdir -p deploy/layer/shared && cp shared/*.js deploy/layer/shared/ && cd deploy/layer && zip -r ../shared-layer.zip shared/ && cd ../.. && rm -rf deploy/layer
scripts.package:all: mkdir -p deploy && npm run package:shared && npm run package:ws && npm run package:device && npm run package:action && npm run package:recording
